nodes.title: Darboux's Theorem
nodes.label: thm:darboux
nodes.text_preview: [Darboux's Theorem] Let $I := [a,b] $ and let $f : I $ be differentiable on $I$. If $k$ is a real number strictly between $f'(a)$ and $f'(b)$, then there exists $c (a,b)$ such that \[ f'(c) = k. \]
